title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0802
summary: 1 Acting under § 10(c) of the Labor Management Relations Act, 1947 (the Taft-Hartley Act), 61 Stat. § 160(c), the National Labor Relations Board ordered the reinstatement of eleven discriminatorily discharged employees of the Seven-Up Bottling Company, with back pay 'to be computed upon a quarter...
